Text.en: You must be brave or stupid to think you might loot my treasure and live. Either way, I applaud you!
Text.zh: 我真不知道你是勇敢还是愚蠢，居然以为能活着带走我的宝贝。怎么说呢，我看好你哟！

Text.en: Proceed, exile, and seize what you can, while you can.
Text.zh: 加油啊，流放者，想拿就多拿点，趁你还拿得动。

Text.en: The corruption is growing. Hurry now, before it consumes you as it did me.
Text.zh: 腐坏在变强。快点，别让它把你也吞掉，落得我一样的下场。

Text.en: Bah! You are unworthy to bear my legacy. Feed the corruption with your corpse.
Text.zh: 呸！你不配拿走我的遗产。用你的尸体去喂腐坏吧。

Text.en: The Nightmare has your scent. Now it hungers for your flesh.
Text.zh: 梦魇闻到了你的气味。它现在就想把你吃掉。

Text.en: Is your cup half empty or half full, exile?
Text.zh: 你现在进退两难了吧，流放者？

Text.en: Disappointing. It seems corruption will get the better of you after all.
Text.zh: 真扫兴啊。看来你最后还是会输给腐坏。

Text.en: The darkness looms forebodingly...
Text.zh: 在黑暗中隐约出现了奇怪的影子...

Text.en: The room grows still and quiet...
Text.zh: 整个房间回复了寂静...

Text.en: The oppressive atmosphere slowly dissipates...
Text.zh: 狂虐的气息慢慢消散...
